notableEvents.label: Jahmai Jones GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jahmai Jones grounds into a double play, shortstop Bobby Witt Jr. to second baseman Jonathan India to first baseman Vinnie Pasquantino. Gleyber Torres out at 2nd. Jahmai Jones out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Kerry Carpenter pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Kerry Carpenter out on a sacrifice fly to left fielder Lane Thomas in foul territory. Kevin McGonigle scores.

notableEvents.label: Colt Keith pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Colt Keith grounds out, second baseman Jonathan India to first baseman Vinnie Pasquantino.

notableEvents.label: Colt Keith pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Colt Keith singles on a sharp line drive to right fielder Jac Caglianone. Riley Greene scores.

notableEvents.label: Cycle game
notableEvents.detail: Team hit a single, double, triple, and home run

notableEvents.label: Colt Keith walk-off
notableEvents.detail: Colt Keith singles on a sharp line drive to right fielder Jac Caglianone. Riley Greene scores.

notableEvents.label: Lane Thomas pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Lane Thomas walks. Jac Caglianone to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Lane Thomas pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Lane Thomas singles on a line drive to left fielder Riley Greene.

notableEvents.label: Walk-off loss
notableEvents.detail: Colt Keith singles on a sharp line drive to right fielder Jac Caglianone. Riley Greene scores.
